title: Freshdesk vs HubSpot
description: Compare Freshdesk vs HubSpot in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right crm & sales tool.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, HubSpot emerges as our recommendation for most users with a 4.5/5 rating compared to 4.3/5. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. We recommend evaluating both tools against your requirements.

faqs.question: Which is better, Freshdesk or HubSpot?
faqs.answer: Based on our detailed comparison, HubSpot edges ahead with a 4.5/5 rating. Freshdesk excels at Freshdesk is a crm & sales platform that helps Support Teams and SMBs and Enterp, while HubSpot is stronger for HubSpot is a unified inbound marketing, sales, and customer service platform bui.

faqs.question: What are the main differences between Freshdesk and HubSpot?
faqs.answer: Freshdesk and HubSpot differ in pricing (Free – $35/agent/mo vs Free – custom), target audience, and feature focus. Our comparison table breaks down these differences.

faqs.question: Is Freshdesk cheaper than HubSpot?
faqs.answer: Freshdesk starts at Free – $35/agent/mo while HubSpot starts at Free – custom. Consider total cost of ownership including implementation and training.

faqs.question: Which tool has better features, Freshdesk or HubSpot?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer strong features for crm & sales. HubSpot scores higher overall, but specific feature needs may favor one over the other.

faqs.question: Can I use Freshdesk and HubSpot together?
faqs.answer: Many organizations use both tools for complementary purposes. However, for overlapping use cases, choosing one streamlines workflows.

faqs.question: Which is easier to use, Freshdesk or HubSpot?
faqs.answer: Both Freshdesk and HubSpot prioritize user experience. The best choice depends on your team's technical expertise and workflow preferences.

faqs.question: Which platform has better customer support?
faqs.answer: Both offer documentation and support tiers. The quality varies by plan level — check our detailed review for support comparisons.

faqs.question: Which crm & sales tool is best for my team size?
faqs.answer: Enterprise features favor Freshdesk for large teams, while HubSpot may be more suitable for smaller teams with its Free – $35/agent/mo pricing.
